moves.name: Accelerock
moves.description: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Acid Armor
moves.description: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Acid Spray
moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the user isn't holding an item.

moves.name: Acupressure
moves.description: Boosts the Attack Defense Sp. Atk Sp. Def Speed accuracy or evasiveness of the user or an ally by 2 stages.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.description: This move never misses.

moves.name: After You
moves.description: Makes the target move immediately after the user.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Air Cutter
moves.description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Alluring Voice
moves.description: Confuses the target if its stats were boosted during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.description: The user switches spots with one of its allies. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Amnesia
moves.description: Boosts the user's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Ancient Power
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of boosting the user's Attack Defense Sp. Atk Sp. Def and Speed stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Apple Acid
moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aqua Cutter
moves.description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Aqua Jet
moves.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.description: The user gains the Aqua Ring status.

moves.name: Aqua Step
moves.description: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aqua Tail
moves.description: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

moves.name: Armor Cannon
moves.description: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aromatic Mist
moves.description: Boosts an ally's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Assurance
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken damage during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Attract
moves.description: Gives the target the Infatuated status. This move will fail against a target that is the same gender as the user or whose gender is unknown.

moves.name: Aura Sphere
moves.description: This move never misses.

moves.name: Aura Wheel
moves.description: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage. This move's type depends on Morpeko's form.

moves.name: Aurora Veil
moves.description: Gives the user's side the Aurora Veil status for 5 turns. This move can be used only in snow.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has already dealt damage to the user with a move in the same turn.

moves.name: Axe Kick
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. If this move misses or fails the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

moves.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Baneful Bunker
moves.description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn become poisoned. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Baton Pass
moves.description: The user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon. If the user had any stat changes a substitute or other such effects they will be passed on to the Pokémon switching in.

moves.name: Beak Blast
moves.description: If the user is hit by a contact move before it uses this move the attacker will be burned.

moves.name: Beat Up
moves.description: The target is attacked as many times as the number of Pokémon in the user's party. Pokémon that have fainted or have a status condition are not counted. This move's power is calculated based on the Attack stats of the party Pokémon.

moves.name: Belch
moves.description: This move fails unless the user has eaten a Berry during the battle.

moves.name: Belly Drum
moves.description: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to boost its Attack stat to its sixth stage. This move fails if the user doesn't have enough remaining HP.

moves.name: Bind
moves.description: Gives the target the Bound status.

moves.name: Bite
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Bitter Blade
moves.description: The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Bitter Malice
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Blast Burn
moves.description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of freezing targets. This move never misses in snow.

moves.name: Block
moves.description: Gives the target the Can't Escape status.

moves.name: Body Press
moves.description: The damage dealt by this move is calculated using the user's Defense stat instead of its Attack stat.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. If the target has the Minimized status this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

moves.name: Bone Rush
moves.description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

moves.name: Boomburst
moves.description: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

moves.name: Bounce
moves.description: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn. This move has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target.

moves.name: Brave Bird
moves.description: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Breaking Swipe
moves.description: Lowers targets' Attack stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Brick Break
moves.description: Removes the Light Screen Reflect and Aurora Veil statuses on the target's side.

moves.name: Brutal Swing
moves.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

moves.name: Bug Bite
moves.description: If the target is holding a Berry the user eats that Berry and gains its effect.

moves.name: Bug Buzz
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.description: Boosts the user's Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.description: Lowers targets' Speed stats by 1 stage. When Grassy Terrain is active this move's power is halved.

moves.name: Bullet Punch
moves.description: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Bullet Seed
moves.description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

moves.name: Burn Up
moves.description: The user loses the Fire type. Cures the user of being frozen. This move fails unless it is used by a Fire type.

moves.name: Burning Jealousy
moves.description: Burns targets if their stats were boosted during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.description: Boosts the user's Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Ceaseless Edge
moves.description: Gives the opponent's side the Spikes status.

moves.name: Charge
moves.description: Boosts the user's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage. The user gains the Electric Boost status.

moves.name: Charge Beam
moves.description: Has a 70% chance of boosting the user's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Charm
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Chilling Water
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Chilly Reception
moves.description: Summons snow for 5 turns. The user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

moves.name: Circle Throw
moves.description: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

moves.name: Clanging Scales
moves.description: Lowers the user's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Clangorous Soul
moves.description: The user loses 1/3 of its max HP to boost its Attack Defense Sp. Atk Sp. Def and Speed stats by 1 stage. This move fails if the user doesn't have enough remaining HP.

moves.name: Clear Smog
moves.description: Removes all stat changes from the target. This move never misses.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.description: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Coaching
moves.description: Boosts allies' Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Coil
moves.description: Boosts the user's Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy by 1 stage.

moves.name: Comeuppance
moves.description: The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an opponent's move during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Confuse Ray
moves.description: Confuses the target.

moves.name: Copycat
moves.description: The user mimics the move that was last used. This move fails if no other move has been used yet.

moves.name: Corrosive Gas
moves.description: Causes all other Pokémon on the field to lose their held items.

moves.name: Cosmic Power
moves.description: Boosts the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Cotton Guard
moves.description: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 3 stages.

moves.name: Cotton Spore
moves.description: Lowers targets' Speed stats by 2 stages.

moves.name: Counter
moves.description: The user retaliates to deal double the damage it took from an opponent's physical move during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Covet
moves.description: If the user is not already holding an item it steals the target's held item.

moves.name: Crabhammer
moves.description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Cross Poison
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of poisoning the target. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Crunch
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Crush Claw
moves.description: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Curse
moves.description: Ghost-type: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to give the target the Cursed status. Non-Ghost-type: Lowers the user's Speed stat by 1 stage and boosts its Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Darkest Lariat
moves.description: This move ignores the target's stat changes when dealing damage.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

moves.name: Decorate
moves.description: Boosts the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 2 stages.

moves.name: Defog
moves.description: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 1 stage. Removes statuses such as Reflect Spikes and Safeguard as well as any terrain.

moves.name: Destiny Bond
moves.description: The user gains the Destiny Bound status. This move fails if used in succession.

moves.name: Detect
moves.description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Dig
moves.description: The user gains the Underground status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn.

moves.name: Dire Claw
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of leaving the target poisoned paralyzed or asleep.

moves.name: Disable
moves.description: Gives the target the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing targets.

moves.name: Dive
moves.description: The user gains the Submerged status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn.

moves.name: Double Hit
moves.description: The user attacks twice in a row.

moves.name: Double Team
moves.description: Boosts the user's evasiveness by 1 stage.

moves.name: Double-Edge
moves.description: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Draco Meteor
moves.description: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Dragon Cheer
moves.description: Gives allies a Critical-Hit Ratio Boost. Dragon types receive a 2-stage boost. All other types receive a 1-stage boost.

moves.name: Dragon Claw
moves.description: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws to inflict damage.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.description: Boosts the user's Attack and Speed stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Dragon Darts
moves.description: The user attacks twice in a row. If there are 2 opposing Pokémon each of them is attacked once.

moves.name: Dragon Pulse
moves.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch. If the target has the Minimized status this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.description: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

moves.name: Drain Punch
moves.description: The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.description: The user's HP is restored by 3/4 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Drill Peck
moves.description: A corkscrewing attack that strikes the target with a sharp beak acting as a drill.

moves.name: Drill Run
moves.description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Dual Wingbeat
moves.description: The user attacks twice in a row.

moves.name: Dynamic Punch
moves.description: Confuses the target.

moves.name: Earth Power
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.description: This move's power is doubled against targets that have the Underground status. When Grassy Terrain is active this move's power is halved.

moves.name: Eerie Impulse
moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Eerie Spell
moves.description: Removes 3 PP from the move last used by the target.

moves.name: Electric Terrain
moves.description: Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns.

moves.name: Electrify
moves.description: If this move hits the target before it uses a move its move becomes Electric type for that turn.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.description: The higher the user's Speed stat compared to the target's the greater this move's power (ranging between 40 and 150).

moves.name: Electro Shot
moves.description: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn. In rain the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. The user's Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.description: Lowers targets' Speed stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Encore
moves.description: Gives the target the Encore status.

moves.name: Endeavor
moves.description: Deals damage to the target equal to its remaining HP minus the user's remaining HP. This move fails if the target's HP is the same as or lower than the user's.

moves.name: Endure
moves.description: During the turn this move is used if the user takes damage from a move that would knock it out it will endure the hit with 1 HP. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Energy Ball
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Entrainment
moves.description: Changes the target's Ability to be the same as the user's.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.description: The less HP the user has left the lower this move's power (ranging between 1 and 150).

moves.name: Expanding Force
moves.description: If the user is under the effect of Psychic Terrain this move's power is boosted by 50% and its range extends to all opponents.

moves.name: Explosion
moves.description: The user faints upon using this move.

moves.name: Extrasensory
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Extreme Speed
moves.description: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Facade
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned badly poisoned burned or paralyzed. Although this move is a physical move the damage it deals is not halved when the user is burned.

moves.name: Fairy Lock
moves.description: Gives all Pokémon on the field the Fairy Locked status.

moves.name: Fake Out
moves.description: Makes the target flinch. This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after it enters a battle.

moves.name: Fake Tears
moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Feint
moves.description: This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect and removes the effects of those moves.

moves.name: Fell Stinger
moves.description: Boosts the user's Attack stat by 3 stages if this move knocks out the target.

moves.name: Fickle Beam
moves.description: This move has a 30% chance of its power being doubled.

moves.name: Fiery Dance
moves.description: Has a 50% chance of boosting the user's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Final Gambit
moves.description: The user faints. This move deals damage to the target equal to the user's remaining HP at the time this move was used.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target.

moves.name: Fire Fang
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Fire Lash
moves.description: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Gives the target the Bound status.

moves.name: First Impression
moves.description: This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after it enters a battle.

moves.name: Fissure
moves.description: Knocks out the target. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%.

moves.name: Flail
moves.description: The less HP the user has left the greater this move's power (ranging between 20 and 200).

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target.

moves.name: Flare Blitz
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target. Cures the user of being frozen. The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Flash Cannon
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Flatter
moves.description: Boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage and confuses it.

moves.name: Fling
moves.description: This move's power and effects depend on the user's held item. The held item is lost after this move is used.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.description: After attacking the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

moves.name: Flower Trick
moves.description: This move never misses and is always a critical hit.

moves.name: Fly
moves.description: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn.

moves.name: Flying Press
moves.description: The damage dealt by this move is calculated by combining the effectiveness of the move's own type with that of the Flying type. If the target has the Minimized status this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Focus Energy
moves.description: The user gains a 2-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.description: This move fails if the user has already taken damage from a move in the same turn.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.description: The user redirects opponents' moves toward itself. This effect works only on single-target moves.

moves.name: Forest's Curse
moves.description: Gives the target the Forest Cursed status.

moves.name: Foul Play
moves.description: The damage dealt by this move is calculated using the target's Attack stat instead of the user's Attack stat.

moves.name: Freeze-Dry
moves.description: This move is also super effective against Water-type Pokémon.

moves.name: Frenzy Plant
moves.description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

moves.name: Frost Breath
moves.description: Always a critical hit.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.description: Gives the target's spot the Future Attack status.

moves.name: Gastro Acid
moves.description: Gives the target the No Ability status.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.description: The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Giga Impact
moves.description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.description: This move can't be used twice in a row.

moves.name: Glare
moves.description: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.description: The heavier the target the greater this move's power (ranging between 20 and 120).

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.description: If the user is under the effect of Grassy Terrain this move's priority becomes +1.

moves.name: Grassy Terrain
moves.description: Turns the entire field into Grassy Terrain for 5 turns.

moves.name: Grav Apple
moves.description: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 1 stage. This move's power is boosted by 50% when the Gravity status is active.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.description: Gives the entire field the Gravity status for 5 turns.

moves.name: Growth
moves.description: Boosts the user's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. In harsh sunlight these stats will be boosted by 2 stages instead.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.description: The user adds its Defense stat to the target's Defense stat then splits the total in half for them to share. It does the same with each of their Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Guard Swap
moves.description: The user swaps the changes to its Defense and Sp. Def stats with the changes to the target's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Guillotine
moves.description: Knocks out the target. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%.

moves.name: Gunk Shot
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target.

moves.name: Gyro Ball
moves.description: The lower the user's Speed stat compared to the target's the greater this move's power (ranging between 1 and 150).

moves.name: Hammer Arm
moves.description: Lowers the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Hard Press
moves.description: The more HP the target has left the greater this move's power (ranging between 1 and 100).

moves.name: Haze
moves.description: Eliminates every stat change on the entire field.

moves.name: Head Smash
moves.description: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Headlong Rush
moves.description: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Heal Bell
moves.description: The user cures the status conditions of all the Pokémon in its party including itself as well as its allies.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Restores 1/2 of the target's max HP.

moves.name: Healing Wish
moves.description: The user faints. The Pokémon taking its place will have its HP fully restored and its status conditions cured.

moves.name: Heat Crash
moves.description: The more the user outweighs the target the greater this move's power (ranging between 40 and 120). If the target has the Minimized status this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

moves.name: Heat Wave
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of burning targets.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.description: The more the user outweighs the target the greater this move's power (ranging between 40 and 120). If the target has the Minimized status this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.description: Boosts the power of an ally's move by 50% during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Hex
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

moves.name: High Horsepower
moves.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

moves.name: High Jump Kick
moves.description: If this move misses or fails the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

moves.name: Horn Drill
moves.description: Knocks out the target. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%.

moves.name: Horn Leech
moves.description: The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Howl
moves.description: Boosts the Attack stats of the user and its allies by 1 stage.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. This move never misses in rain and can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.

moves.name: Hydro Cannon
moves.description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.description: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

moves.name: Hypnosis
moves.description: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of freezing the target.

moves.name: Ice Fang
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of freezing the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Ice Hammer
moves.description: Lowers the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Ice Punch
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of freezing the target.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: The user flash-freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Ice Spinner
moves.description: Removes any terrain.

moves.name: Icicle Crash
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Icicle Spear
moves.description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: Lowers targets' Speed stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Imprison
moves.description: The user gains the Sealing Off status.

moves.name: Infernal Parade
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

moves.name: Inferno
moves.description: Burns the target.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.description: Gives the target the Bound status.

moves.name: Ingrain
moves.description: The user gains the Ingrained status.

moves.name: Instruct
moves.description: The user makes the target reuse the last move it used.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.description: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Jet Punch
moves.description: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

moves.name: King's Shield
moves.description: The user protects itself from incoming attacks for the turn and changes into its Shield Forme. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn will have their Attack stats lowered by 1 stage. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.description: This move's power is boosted by 50% if the target is holding an item. Causes the target to lose its held item.

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.description: This move never misses.

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Last Resort
moves.description: This move fails unless the user has already used all the other moves it knows.

moves.name: Last Respects

moves.name: Lava Plume
moves.description: Has a 30% chance of burning targets.

moves.name: Leaf Blade

moves.name: Leaf Storm

moves.name: Leech Seed

moves.name: Life Dew

moves.name: Light of Ruin
moves.description: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.description: Gives the user's side the Light Screen status for 5 turns.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Lock-On
moves.description: The user gains the Locked On status.

moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Lunge
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.description: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Magnet Rise

moves.description: Has a 20% chance of burning targets. The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Metal Burst

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Meteor Beam

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of boosting the user's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Milk Drink
moves.description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP.

moves.name: Minimize

moves.name: Moonblast

moves.name: Moonlight

moves.name: Morning Sun
moves.description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP. In harsh sunlight 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.description: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Night Daze
moves.description: Has a 40% chance of lowering the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

moves.name: Night Shade

moves.name: Noble Roar
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Nuzzle

moves.description: The user gains the Rampaging status.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.description: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Parabolic Charge

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.description: The user gains the Rampaging status.

moves.name: Phantom Force

moves.name: Pin Missile

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Poison Powder
moves.description: Poisons the target.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Power Shift

moves.name: Power Swap

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.description: The user gains the Atk/Def Swapped status.

moves.name: Power Trip

moves.name: Power Whip

moves.name: Protect
moves.description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Psych Up

moves.description: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Safeguard

moves.name: Salt Cure

moves.name: Sandstorm

moves.name: Scary Face

moves.description: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. Cures the user and target of being frozen.

moves.description: The user faints upon using this move.

moves.name: Sleep Powder

moves.description: Gives the target the Bound status.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.description: Lowers targets' Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP.

moves.description: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. This move's power is halved in any other weather condition.

moves.description: The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. This move's power is halved in any other weather condition.

moves.description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP. With each consecutive use this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.

moves.name: Swagger

moves.description: Lowers targets' evasiveness by 2 stages.

moves.description: The user attacks 3 times in a row-first with a power of 20 then with a power of 40 then with a power of 60. The attack ends if the user misses.

moves.name: Trop Kick
moves.description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Twin Beam
moves.description: The user attacks twice in a row.

moves.name: U-turn
moves.description: After attacking the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

moves.name: Upper Hand
moves.description: Makes the target flinch. This move fails if the target isn't about to use a priority move.

moves.name: Uproar
moves.description: The user gains the Uproar status.

moves.name: Vacuum Wave
moves.description: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the target. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Venoshock
moves.description: This move's power is doubled if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.description: After attacking the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.description: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target. The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of confusing the target.

moves.name: Water Shuriken
moves.description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.description: The less HP the user has left the lower this move's power (ranging between 1 and 150).

moves.name: Waterfall
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

moves.name: Wave Crash
moves.description: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.description: When a weather condition is present this move's power is doubled and its type changes. Harsh sunlight Fire type. Rain Water type. Snow Ice type. Sandstorm Rock type.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Gives the target the Bound status. This move's power is doubled if the target has the Submerged status.

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.description: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.description: During the turn this move is used the user protects its side from moves that target all allies.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.description: The user takes 1/4 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Will-O-Wisp
moves.description: Burns the target.

moves.name: Wish
moves.description: Gives the user's spot the Wish status.

moves.name: Wonder Room
moves.description: Gives the entire field the Wonder Room status for 5 turns.

moves.name: Wood Hammer
moves.description: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.description: Changes the target's Ability to Insomnia.

moves.name: Wrap
moves.description: Gives the target the Bound status.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors.

moves.name: Yawn
moves.description: Makes the target drowsy. This move never misses.

moves.name: Zap Cannon
moves.description: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Zen Headbutt
moves.description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.
